message:
fix: EPG parsing off main thread + branding/UX polish

- Move EPG decompression + XML parsing to background isolate via compute()
- Batch DB inserts (5000 rows) with event loop yields to prevent ANR
- Rename 'clubtivi' → 'clubTivi' in all platform display names
- Add version watermark to channel sidebar
- Cache startup update check (once per session)
- Show channel count in sidebar 'All' item
- Add scroll fade gradient at bottom of channel list

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
     <uses-feature android:name="android.software.leanback" android:required="false"/>
 
     <application
-        android:label="clubtivi"
+        android:label="clubTivi"
         android:name="${applicationName}"
         android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher"
         android:banner="@mipmap/ic_launcher">

@@ -90,12 +90,12 @@ BEGIN
         BLOCK "040904e4"
         BEGIN
             VALUE "CompanyName", "io.github.clubanderson" "\0"
-            VALUE "FileDescription", "clubtivi" "\0"
+            VALUE "FileDescription", "clubTivi" "\0"
             VALUE "FileVersion", VERSION_AS_STRING "\0"
             VALUE "InternalName", "clubtivi" "\0"
             VALUE "LegalCopyright", "Copyright (C) 2026 io.github.clubanderson. All rights reserved." "\0"
             VALUE "OriginalFilename", "clubtivi.exe" "\0"
-            VALUE "ProductName", "clubtivi" "\0"
+            VALUE "ProductName", "clubTivi" "\0"
             VALUE "ProductVersion", VERSION_AS_STRING "\0"
         END
     END
